name: Prediction Market Data Zh
description: Native-first ClawHub plugin for `prediction-market-data-zh`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. 通过 AIsa 查询股票、加密、预测市场与投资分析数据。触发条件：当用户需要市场研究、筛选、价格走势或组合分析时使用。支持研究与分析输出。

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.
